_comment: Verify fork corrupts the user stack. Break at the fork syscall (RAX=57) from openrc's signal setup function. Read the struct sigaction before fork, then after fork in the child, check if it changed. The struct is at RBX = RSP+0x100 at the time of the call. We break at syscall_entry when RAX=57 (fork) and check the stack.

steps.name: catch_fork_from_signal_setup
steps._comment: syscall_entry. Condition: RAX=57 (fork) AND the caller is openrc's signal setup function (RCX near 0xa00004f5e = return addr after fork call at 0x4f58). Check RCX for this process.
